media.ext_alt_text: The night in the rainforests holds a deadly silence over the tree frogs. The darkness swallows them whole, as if they will never return.
The iguanas live in the hidden corners of the world, where the sound of rain no longer reaches. Nature has hidden itself behind this silence, where no one hears its call.

media.ext_alt_text: The Silent Forest is a place where trees hide ancient secrets within the soil. Here, life and death merge, awaiting a new beginning in eternal silence. In this soundless world of nature, nothing truly dies; it simply continues in a different form.
